description: AirHint flight price prediction API — buy/wait recommendations for airline tickets

novel_features.name: Multi-date Prediction Sweep
novel_features.description: Sweep buy/wait predictions across a date range for a route, fetching live prices for each date

novel_features.name: Multi-route Comparison
novel_features.description: Compare buy/wait predictions across multiple origin-destination pairs on the same date

novel_features.name: Cheapest Window Finder
novel_features.description: Find the cheapest departure date in a given month using the cheapest-deal-month and cheapest-airline-deal-month endpoints
